ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability and quality of data from the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the data is from */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "daily_rainfall_total_mm" REAL /* Total daily rainfall in millimeters */,
  "highest_30_min_rainfall_mm" REAL /* Highest 30-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "highest_60_min_rainfall_mm" REAL /* Highest 60-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "highest_120_min_rainfall_mm" REAL /* Highest 120-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "mean_temperature_c" REAL /* Mean temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_temperature_c" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temperature_c" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "mean_wind_speed_kmph" REAL /* Mean wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "max_wind_speed_kmph" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "humidity_percentage" REAL /* Average daily humidity percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Average daily atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "wind_direction_degrees" REAL /* Average daily wind direction in degrees */,
  "solar_radiation_wpm2" REAL /* Average daily solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow, hail) */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" REAL /* Average daily cloud cover percentage */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability and quality of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "data_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the data accessed in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES daily_weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance event in minutes */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
